In QGroundControl settings, the 'Mute all audio output' (or similar audio muting) checkbox is checked.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the QGroundControl GUI to change settings.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual QGroundControl application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl interface is authentic and not a mock-up or text file.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing QGroundControl.ini.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal or text editor open showing modifications to the QGroundControl.ini configuration file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The SOP requires the following specific settings in QGroundControl: Theme must be 'Outdoor' (Light mode), Audio must be muted, Map Provider must be 'Esri', Video Source must be 'RTSP Video Stream', and RTSP URL must be exactly 'rtsp://10.0.5.50:8554/tactical_feed'.
